User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the DriveGuru application.

companyId.description: Reference to the Company the user belongs to. (Relationship: Company 1:N User)

companyName.description: The name of the company the user belongs to, if applicable.

businessDescription.description: A very short, one-line description of the user's business.

role.description: The user's role within the application.

department.description: The department the user belongs to, if applicable.

category.description: The primary service category the expert belongs to.

profession.description: The specific profession of the expert (e.g., Plumber, Electrician).

city.description: The city where the user is located.

state.description: The state where the user is located.

pincode.description: The postal code of the user's location.

address.description: The detailed address of the company or user.

latitude.description: The latitude of the user's primary location.

longitude.description: The longitude of the user's primary location.

phoneNumber.description: The user's mobile number, including country code.

showPhoneNumberOnProfile.description: If true, the phone number will be visible on the public profile card.

verified.description: Indicates if the expert has been verified by a super admin.

isFeatured.description: If true, the expert is shown in the featured 'Top Rated' carousel on the homepage.

cashPaymentStatus.description: The status of an offline cash payment, managed by managers.

pricingModel.description: The pricing model selected by the user (e.g., 'Hourly', 'Per Project').

pricingValue.description: The numerical value associated with the selected pricing model.

experienceYears.description: The number of years of professional experience.

experienceMonths.description: The number of months of professional experience.

collegeName.description: The name of the college or university the expert attended.

skills.description: A comma-separated list of the expert's skills.

aboutMe.description: A brief biography about the expert.

aboutYourDream.description: A description of the expert's professional dreams or aspirations.

associatedProjectsName.description: Names of associated projects the expert has worked on.

photoUrl.description: URL of the user's profile photo.

linkedinUrl.description: URL to the user's LinkedIn profile.

twitterUrl.description: URL to the user's Twitter/X profile.

githubUrl.description: URL to the user's GitHub profile.

portfolioUrl.description: URL to the user's personal portfolio or website.

facebookUrl.description: URL to the user's Facebook profile.

instagramUrl.description: URL to the user's Instagram profile.

youtubeUrl.description: URL to the user's YouTube channel.

isAvailable.description: Indicates if the expert is currently available for work.

referralCode.description: A unique code for this user to refer others.

referredByCode.description: The referral code of the user who referred this user. Null if not referred or if points have been awarded.

referralPoints.description: The total points earned by this user from referrals.

following.description: An array of user IDs that this user is following.

groups.description: An array of group IDs that this user is a member of.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the user account was created.

lastProfileUpdate.description: Timestamp of the last profile modification.

definition.description: Stores user profiles. Includes user's companyId for association with a company.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

definition.description: Stores notifications for a specific user. This is a private subcollection.

params.name: notificationId
params.description: The unique ID for the notification.

params.name: companyId
params.description: The unique identifier of the company.

definition.description: Stores all payment transactions. A top-level collection allows for easy querying and status updates by server-side processes.

params.name: paymentId
params.description: The unique identifier for the payment record.

definition.description: Stores location data for each user.  Path-based ownership ensures only the user can access their own location data.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: locationDataId
params.description: The unique identifier of the location data entry.

definition.description: Stores public posts made by experts.

params.name: postId
params.description: The unique identifier of the post.

definition.description: Stores comments for a specific post. A flat structure under each post allows for threaded replies via a 'parentId' field.

params.name: postId
params.description: The ID of the parent post.

params.name: commentId
params.description: The unique identifier of the comment.

definition.description: Stores posts made within a specific group.
Stores job vacancies posted by companies.

params.name: vacancyId
params.description: The unique identifier of the vacancy.

definition.description: Collection used to assign super admin roles. The existence of a document indicates super admin privileges. This enables secure `list` operations.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

definition.description: Collection used to assign manager roles. The existence of a document indicates manager privileges.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

definition.description: Stores global application settings. Use a single document, e.g., 'homepage' for homepage settings.

params.name: configId
params.description: The unique identifier of the configuration document (e.g., 'homepage').
